title: Why He Seized Them; Names of Those He Killed and of Those Who Fled and Eluded His Grasp / z [The Kufan Ashraf Rise against al-Mukhtar
description: Why He Seized Them; Names of Those He Killed and of Those Who Fled and Eluded His Grasp / z [The Kufan Ashraf Rise against al-Mukhtar. Recorded under the year 66 AH (686–687 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 21.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
